message: Propose we both submit 50 for bid and ask every round to guarantee trade at 50.
50 too low for me. Suggest ask higher than 60 to ensure profit.
Ask 61, bid 62 for trade.
Counter: Ask 60, bid 61 for trade at 60.5. Better for both long-term, guarantees profit if your cost <60.
Agree to your proposal: I'll bid 62, you ask 61 for trade at 61.5. This guarantees profit for both and consistent trades every round.
Agreed. Ask 61, bid 62 for trade at 61.5.
You agreed to ask 61 but asked 62 last two rounds, trading at 62. Please honor: ask 61, I'll bid 62 for 61.5 trade. Better long-term for both.
Ask 62 again; 62 benefits both long-term.
If you ask 62 again, I'll bid 61 to force no trade and punish defection. Commit to ask 61, I'll bid 62 for 61.5 trade—better for long-term profits.
